name: GetMandate
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific mandate by its ID. This shows the mandate's status, payment method, consumer details (name, account, BIC), signature date, and creation timestamp. Use this to inspect a specific authorization before charging a customer or to verify mandate validity.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer who owns the mandate (e.g., 'cst_abc123').

mandate_id.description: The ID of the mandate to retrieve (e.g., 'mdt_abc123'). This is returned when you create a mandate or list mandates.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to retrieve a test mode mandate, or omit for live mode.
